reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request introduces a caching mechanism for remote branches in `src/branchUtils.ts` to optimize API calls and reduce redundant API requests. A `remoteBranchesCache` with a 5-minute time-to-live (TTL) is added, and the `getBranchesForSession` function is updated to utilize this cache, fetching data from it if available and not stale, or otherwise making an API call and storing the result. The review feedback suggests improving type safety by defining a more specific type for the `remoteBranchesCache` to avoid the use of `any`, which would also allow for better type inference and cleaner code in related operations.

### 💡 Codex Review Here are some automated review suggestions for this pull request. **Reviewed commit:** `eb913527dc`
ℹ️ About Codex in GitHub
[Your team has set up Codex to review pull requests in this repo](http://chatgpt.com/codex/settings/general). Reviews are triggered when you - Open a pull request for review - Mark a draft as ready - Comment "@codex review". If Codex has suggestions, it will comment; otherwise it will react with 👍. Codex can also answer questions or update the PR. Try commenting "@codex address that feedback".
